common.choose_option: Please choose one of the options below:

errors.start_bot:
⚠️ To participate, please open the bot and press /start first.

Then come back and click Join.
errors.already_in_game: ⚠️ You are already in the game
errors.cannot_leave_running: ⚠️ You cannot leave a game in progress.

voting.target_not_alive: 🟨 Target is not alive anymore. Nobody is lynched.
